name: TTArtisan AF 56mm f1.8
description: A lightweight prime ideal for portraiture, the AF 56mm f/1.8 Lens from TTArtisan is designed for use with APS-C FUJIFILM X-mount mirrorless cameras and provides a portrait-length full-frame equivalency of 84mm.

features.Key Features:: APS-C | f/1.8 to f/16 | 84mm (Full-Frame Equivalent) | Stepping Motor AF System | 9-Blade Diaphragm | One ED Element | Supports Eye Detection Focus | Aluminum Build | USB-C Interface for Firmware Updates
features.What's In The Box?: TTArtisan AF 56mm f/1.8 Lens (FUJIFILM X) | Front Lens Cap | Rear Lens Cap | Lens Hood
